figures.title: Look-Ahead-Freedom as Temporal Non-Interference: A Verifiable Correctness Property for Backtesting and Agentic Trading Pipelines
figures.caption: Fig. 1. The two ideas the calculus is built on. (a) Every datum carries two independent temporal coordinates: its reference time (which instant it describes) and its availability (when it becomes knowable); the two differ by an ingest lag, and look-ahead occurs precisely when a datum whose availability follows a decision epoch 𝑡influences the decision at 𝑡.
